# Rex Velocity

> The ultimate energy drink brand for the apex predator. Find your fuel, explore the science, and join the pack.

This site is an e-commerce platform for Rex Velocity energy drinks.

## Main Pages

- [Home](/) - The landing page featuring brand introduction and hero sections.
- [Shop](/shop) - Browse and purchase all Rex Velocity energy drink products.
- [Cart](/cart) - View your selected items and proceed to checkout.
- [The Science](/formula) - Learn about the ingredients, formula, and benefits of Rex Velocity drinks.
- [Reviews](/reviews) - Read customer feedback and testimonials.
- [Store Locations](/locations) - Find nearby physical stores carrying Rex Velocity products.
- [Contact Us](/contact) - Get in touch with the Rex Velocity team.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy) - Information on data collection, usage, and privacy practices.

## Products

Individual product pages provide detailed information, nutritional facts, and purchase options for each flavor:

- [Prehistoric Punch](/product/01)
- [Volcanic Blood](/product/02)
- [Raptor Rush](/product/03)
- [Jungle Jolt](/product/04)
- [Arctic Annihilation](/product/05)
- [Fossil Fuel](/product/06)
- [Neon Nebula](/product/07)
- [Electric Extinction](/product/08)
- [Electric Extinction Tub](/product/09)
- [Volcanic Blood Tub](/product/10)
